calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause For Change Of Name.
Off Calendar Nov-14-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Petitioner: Anotnio Segovia, present in pro per with Spanish Interpreter: Francisco Orellana.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
Without consent by the minor's mother and improper venue, petitioner's request for change of name of a minor is denied without prejudice.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-12-2006 Off Calendar
